findings.evidence: `ThreeCycle.lean:132-145` proves non-exchangeability directly; `ThreeCycle.lean:150-163` proves non-contractability similarly; `Contractability.lean:130-132` provides `theorem Exchangeable.contractable ... : Contractable μ X`.
findings.fix: Move `threeCycle_not_contractable` before `threeCycle_not_exchangeable` and prove `threeCycle_not_exchangeable` by `intro hE; exact threeCycle_not_contractable (hE.contractable (fun _ => Measurable.of_discrete.aemeasurable))`, deleting the swapped-event proof if then unused.
findings.issue: `threeCycle_not_exchangeable` duplicates a special-case two-coordinate rectangle proof even though the file also proves `threeCycle_not_contractable`, which is the stronger negative result via the existing implication `Exchangeable.contractable`.

summary: The example proves the stronger non-contractability result but still reproves the weaker non-exchangeability failure directly, bypassing the existing hierarchy API.
